heading: Deposits in special fund; availability for all purposes of Federal Home Loan Bank Board and Federal Home Loan Bank Administration
label: 1439a Deposits in special fund; availability for all purposes of Federal Home Loan Bank Board and Federal Home Loan Bank Administration
text: All moneys and funds heretofore deposited in the Treasury of the United States under the last sentence of section 1439 of this title (including unexpended balances of moneys appropriated therefrom for administrative expenses), and hereafter all moneys and funds which would, except for this provision, be so depositable thereunder, shall be deposited with the Treasurer of the United States in a special deposit account and shall be available, retroactively as well as prospectively, for expenditure for all purposes of the Federal Home Loan Bank Board and the Federal Home Loan Bank Administration, subject to subsections (a) and (b) of .1section 712a of title 15See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was repealed by , , .Section 1439 of this titlePub. L. 101–73, title VII, § 708103 Stat. 418Aug. 9, 1989
CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Independent Offices Appropriation Act, 1944, and not as part of the Federal Home Loan Bank Act which comprises this chapter.

Change of Name“Home Loan Bank Board” changed to “Federal Home Loan Bank Board” by , which was classified to prior to the repeal of section 1437 by , , . Previously, “Home Loan Bank Board” had been substituted for “Federal Home Loan Bank Board” by Reorg. Plan No. 3 of 1947.act Aug. 11, 1955, ch. 783, § 109(a)(3)section 1437(b) of this titlePub. Transfer of FunctionsFederal Home Loan Bank Board abolished and functions transferred, see sections 401 to 406 of , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 101–73section 1437 of this title
Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions to Secretary of the Treasury, see note set out under .section 55 of this title
